title: sv: extended support for integer types

features.name: parameter_logic_without_width
features.description: Code should include a parameter declaration with logic type and no explicit width, which should be 1 bit (previously incorrectly treated as 32 bits)

features.name: localparam_reg_without_width
features.description: Code should include a localparam declaration with reg type and no explicit width, which should be 1 bit (previously incorrectly treated as 32 bits)

features.name: longint_type_declaration
features.description: Code should include a declaration using the longint type, a 64-bit signed integer type

features.name: integer_type_in_function_return
features.description: Code should include a function declaration with an integer type (byte, shortint, int, or longint) as the return type

features.name: integer_type_in_parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameter declaration using an integer type (byte, shortint, int, or longint) rather than logic or wire
